name: Keka
description: Keka is a modern HR and payroll platform for employee lifecycle management, including hiring, onboarding, attendance, performance, and offboarding.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Keka as an admin
2. Go to Settings > API > Generate API Key
3. Copy the Client ID, Client Secret, and API Key
4. Your subdomain is the part before .keka.com in your URL (e.g. for https://acme.keka.com, enter 'acme')
5. Enter all credentials below

credentialFields.label: Company Subdomain
credentialFields.helpText: Your Keka company subdomain. For example, if you access Keka at https://acme.keka.com, enter 'acme'.

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: The Client ID from your Keka API application. Go to Settings > API > Generate API Key.

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: The Client Secret from your Keka API application.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: The API Key from your Keka API application.

checks.name: Keka Employee Directory
checks.description: Verifies that employee records can be accessed through the Keka API and that active employees exist in the system.

checks.name: Keka Organizational Structure
checks.description: Verifies that departments are defined in Keka, confirming organizational structure is properly configured for compliance reporting.

checks.name: Keka Employee Offboarding Process
checks.description: Verifies that exit reasons are configured in Keka, ensuring a proper employee offboarding process is in place for compliance.

checks.name: Keka Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies that groups and group types are configured in Keka, confirming role-based access controls are in place for organizational management.
